3094690.name: Elflock
3094690.description:
In Elflock, you play a young princess who, having just returned to her war-torn homeland, must quickly realize that her enemies are not only those who lurk outside her kingdom's borders… 

THE FATE OF AN ENTIRE KINGDOM IN YOUR HANDS

Navigate the obscure political maze that is the royal court, uncover the secrets of your castle, make allies or enemies! Help your father, the king, save your home, or burn the old world to the ground so you can build a new one on its ruins.

EVERY CHOICE MATTERS

Elflock’s gameplay combines the puzzles of classic adventure games with highly detailed locations and branching dialogue options that significantly influence the plot, as seen in epic RPGs. Every decision you make carries weight, and every answer you give can influence how the story unfolds…

GAMEPLAY

🏰 EXPLORE YOUR LEGACY: Rediscover the castle where you spent your childhood, and where you return now as a young adult after a decade spent abroad. Meet old acquaintances, make new friends, or maybe even find true love!

📜 CHOOSE WISELY: Your answers during branching conversations will not only determine other characters' opinion about you, but also the fate of your kingdom.

🗝️ USE YOUR WITS: Investigate, gather evidence, solve puzzles, and expose the conspirators at the royal court!

🔮 A MAGICAL TALE: Elflock is a fairy tale based on Hungarian folklore and it is told mainly in Hungarian, one of the world’s most unique languages – with English subtitles of course.

👸 AN EYE-CATCHING EXPERIENCE: Immerse yourself in a multitude of authentic medieval locations with realistic graphics! Choose from different dresses or accessories, and find your own style with the character customization feature.

WISHLIST NOW!
3094690.supported_languages:
英语, 匈牙利语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
